name: Tricky Fox
short_description: Help this little fox by jumping on tiles but don’t fall down! Tricky Fox is the sequel to Tricky Cat with all new gameplay, graphics, music, sounds, and much more levels. Are you able to challenge yourself again?
detailed_description:
Take on the role of a clever little fox in Tricky Fox, the sequel to the popular Tricky Cat. Jump, walk, and puzzle your way through 100 increasingly challenging levels as you clear all the tiles by stepping on them—just be careful not to fall into the bottomless pit! Once all tiles disappear, the exit portal opens, but getting there won't be easy with spikes and tricky moving tiles in your way.

As you progress, levels become more complex with timed jumps, spikes that retract and extend, and tiles that need to be cleared in specific sequences. Every level requires quick thinking and precise moves, making Tricky Fox a perfect blend of platforming and puzzle-solving. With its fresh gameplay, catchy soundtrack, and fun level design, this game will keep you on your toes.

Key Features:

  • 100 levels of challenging platform-puzzle gameplay

  • Dynamic levels with disappearing tiles, moving platforms, and spikes

  • Fun and unique mechanics to keep you engaged

  • All-new graphics, sound, and music compared to the original

  • Simple controls and addictive gameplay for all ages

Are you ready to outfox the puzzles and guide the tricky fox to victory? Jump into Tricky Fox today for an exciting platforming adventure!
